command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash -s <<'REMOTE'
echo "=== Restart openclaw fresh to clear the restart-loop state ==="
systemctl --user restart openclaw-gateway 2>/dev/null && echo restarted
echo "Waiting 30s for telegram provider to settle..."
sleep 30

echo "=== Recent telegram log - is the Conflict GONE? ==="
journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway --since "35 seconds ago" --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "telegram|conflict|polling|provider|exited" | tail -12

echo ""
echo "=== Count Conflict errors in last 35s (0 = fixed) ==="
journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway --since "35 seconds ago" --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -c "Conflict"
REMOTE
